**Commit**: `f9ccc0083ca2` — feat(coc): sync loom 2.8.16 → 2.8.18 — three follow-up cycles (2.9.6 + 2.9.7)

**Body**:

Extends PR #55 (which was three accumulated cycles 2.9.3+2.9.4+2.9.5)
with three more loom cycles applying to rs:

# 2.9.6 — loom 2.8.16 + 2.8.17 (cross-language deliveries from /sync py round 4 + rs round 3)

NEW global rules:
- rules/worktree-isolation.md (loom 2.8.16, path-scoped to agents/commands)
- rules/nexus-http-status-convention.md (loom 2.8.17, {error,code} body shape contract)

NEW global skill:
- skills/03-nexus/nexus-extractors.md (loom 2.8.17, Option D NexusExtract trait)

Rule extensions:
- rules/observability.md (loom 2.8.16, LogRecord reserved-attr collision +
  Rust tracing field collision)
- rules/dataflow-identifier-safety.md (loom 2.8.16, Rule 6 primitive-vs-orchestrator
  separation: DropRefusedError DDL primitive vs DowngradeRefusedError orchestrator)
- rules/orphan-detection.md (loom 2.8.17, Detection Protocol step 3:
  bridge-shim verification)

Variants/py NOT applied to rs target per overlay convention.

# 2.9.7 — loom 2.8.18 (body-shape reconciliation)

REWRITE: skills/03-nexus/nexus-http-status-convention.md — body shape
{error, status: <int>} → {error, code: "<STRING>"} to match actual SDK
contract verified by red-team grep against 8 production references in
crates/kailash-nexus/src/. Catalog gained code column (12 canonical
SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE identifiers). Removed two now-incorrect anti-patterns
(banning code as top-level key, banning status mismatch). Examples updated
to NexusHandlerError + handler_extract pattern. Skill reframed as catalog
companion to the 2.8.17 contract rule.

Cargo pins: unchanged (kailash-enterprise>=3.18.0). No SDK release.
